patch.value: Fix Windows Nightly smoke cleanup helper import

Nightly Validation run 27192052551 failed on windows-latest Node 20 while loading tests/integration/smoke-pack-cleanup.integration.spec.ts with SyntaxError. Duplicate check found only closed pm-i2xg for ENOTEMPTY cleanup behavior and open pm-ehbb for alerting, not this import-safety failure. Extract cleanupTempRoot into an import-safe smoke-cleanup module and keep the executable smoke script as the pack runner.

value.note: Import-safe cleanup helper for smoke tests

author: codex-impl-20260609
message: Start Windows Nightly import-safety fix; bundled with package-platform lifecycle PR after GitHub triage.

value.note: Reuse cleanup helper from executable pack smoke
Avoid importing executable smoke script during suite load

value.author: codex-impl-20260609
value.text: Evidence: fixed GitHub Nightly Validation run 27192052551 failure path by extracting cleanupTempRoot from executable scripts/smoke-npx-from-pack.mjs into import-safe scripts/smoke-cleanup.mjs and updating the smoke cleanup test import. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/smoke-pack-cleanup.integration.spec.ts; npx -y node@20 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/integration/smoke-pack-cleanup.integration.spec.ts; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/smoke-pack-cleanup.integration.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage => 2606 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines; pnpm build/typecheck/quality:static/contracts:check/changelog:pm:check/security:scan/audit moderate; manual isolated temp smoke passed.

patch.value: Fixed Windows Nightly smoke cleanup import path by extracting cleanupTempRoot into an import-safe helper module; verified focused Node 20 smoke and full coverage gates.
Extracted smoke cleanup logic into an import-safe helper module and updated the cleanup regression test to import that helper.
Windows Nightly can load the packed smoke cleanup test without parsing the executable smoke runner during suite setup.
tests/integration/smoke-pack-cleanup.integration.spec.ts imports scripts/smoke-cleanup.mjs; scripts/smoke-npx-from-pack.mjs still uses the same cleanup helper for pack smoke cleanup.

value.author: codex-impl-20260609
value.text: Review follow-up: Gemini suggested treating EACCES as retryable for Windows cleanup locks. Applied to scripts/smoke-cleanup.mjs alongside ENOTEMPTY/EBUSY/EPERM; focused cleanup tests rerun before push.

value.author: codex-impl-20260609
value.text: Review polish: CodeRabbit suggested restoring the cleanup helper's first-level-entry removal comment after extraction. Restored the comment in scripts/smoke-cleanup.mjs; focused cleanup tests rerun before push.

value.author: codex-impl-20260609
value.text: Review follow-up: Gemini flagged Atomics.wait in the synchronous cleanup retry delay. Replaced it with a short busy-wait loop suitable for this standalone smoke cleanup helper; focused cleanup tests rerun before push.

value.author: codex-impl-20260609
value.text: Review follow-up: Gemini suggested avoiding CPU spin in the synchronous cleanup retry delay. Replaced busy wait with spawnSync(process.execPath, ['-e', setTimeout...]) and reran focused cleanup tests.

value.author: codex-impl-20260609
value.text: Review follow-up: Gemini flagged child-process sleep overhead in smoke cleanup retries. Verified local Node supports Atomics.wait synchronous sleep, replaced spawnSync sleep with Atomics.wait, and reran node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/smoke-pack-cleanup.integration.spec.ts plus pnpm build and pnpm quality:static.
